mapper.insert: INSERT INTO db_agent.provisioning_request (id, title, host, ssh_port, ssh_user, auth_type, database_name, schema_name, memory_mb, disk_gb, data_directory, extensions, db_owner_user, pg_major_version, os_family, os_version_label, status, error_summary, connection_hint, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{host}, #{sshPort}, #{sshUser}, #{authType}, #{databaseName}, #{schemaName}, #{memoryMb}, #{diskGb}, #{dataDirectory}, #{extensions}::jsonb, #{dbOwnerUser}, #{pgMajorVersion}, #{osFamily}, #{osVersionLabel}, #{status}, #{errorSummary}, #{connectionHint}, #{createdAt}::timestamptz, #{updatedAt}::timestamptz)
mapper.update: UPDATE db_agent.provisioning_request SET status = #{status}, error_summary = #{errorSummary}, connection_hint = #{connectionHint}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}::timestamptz WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, host, ssh_port, ssh_user, auth_type, database_name, schema_name, memory_mb, disk_gb, data_directory, extensions::text AS extensions, db_owner_user, pg_major_version, os_family, os_version_label, status, error_summary, connection_hint, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM db_agent.provisioning_request WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, title, host, ssh_port, ssh_user, auth_type, database_name, schema_name, memory_mb, disk_gb, data_directory, extensions::text AS extensions, db_owner_user, pg_major_version, os_family, os_version_label, status, error_summary, connection_hint, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM db_agent.provisioning_request ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO db_agent.provisioning_step (request_id, step_name, status, log_text, sort_order, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{stepName}, #{status}, #{logText}, #{sortOrder}, #{startedAt}::timestamptz, #{finishedAt}::timestamptz)
mapper.update: UPDATE db_agent.provisioning_step SET status = #{status}, log_text = #{logText}, started_at = #{startedAt}::timestamptz, finished_at = #{finishedAt}::timestamptz WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND step_name = #{stepName}
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_id, step_name, status, log_text, sort_order, started_at::text AS started_at, finished_at::text AS finished_at FROM db_agent.provisioning_step WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE db_agent.provisioning_step SET status = 'PENDING', log_text = NULL, started_at = NULL, finished_at = NULL WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
